children.content: Design tokens extracted from the coide app — the dark, near-black surface system with a blue primary accent. Every token here is set at the framesmith workspace layer and inherits into every canvas.
Overlays — translucent white, composited over surface-4 for hover / active states
Foreground — text tiers (white at decreasing opacity)
Semantic — status colors (base + soft text variant)
State accents — violet · purple · indigo (thinking · worktree · draft). Each has a -soft text variant.
System stack — -apple-system, Inter, Segoe UI. Code uses SF Mono / ui-monospace.
Claude wants to edit claude.ts — review the diff before approving.
Secondary copy and helper text sits at this size.
